name: imwrite
summary: Write image data to PNG, JPEG, GIF, BMP, or TIFF files.
description: Writes grayscale, truecolor, RGBA, logical, and indexed image arrays to common image formats. Numeric floating-point image data is interpreted in the normalized range [0, 1]; uint8 data is written directly; uint16 data is preserved for PNG/TIFF and projected to 8-bit for GIF/JPEG/BMP.

inputs.name: A
inputs.description: MxN grayscale image, MxNx3 RGB image, or MxNx4 RGBA image.

inputs.name: X
inputs.description: MxN indexed image. uint8/uint16 indices are zero-based; floating-point indices are one-based.

inputs.name: map
inputs.description: Nx3 colormap for indexed image writes.

inputs.name: filename
inputs.description: Destination path. The file extension is used to infer the format when fmt is omitted.

inputs.name: fmt
inputs.description: Explicit format hint such as "png", "jpg", "gif", "bmp", "tif", or "tiff".

nameValueOptions.name: Alpha
nameValueOptions.description: MxN alpha plane used for PNG, GIF, and TIFF output.

nameValueOptions.name: Quality
nameValueOptions.description: JPEG quality from 0 to 100. Default is 75.

nameValueOptions.name: LoopCount
nameValueOptions.description: GIF repeat count. Inf requests infinite looping.

nameValueOptions.name: WriteMode
nameValueOptions.description: "overwrite" or "append". Append is supported for GIF animations.

compatibility.matlab: Covers the common MATLAB imwrite forms for direct-color, indexed, alpha PNG/GIF/TIFF, JPEG quality, and animated GIF append workflows. Advanced writer options such as compression-specific tuning, comments, and transparent-color metadata currently produce explicit unsupported-option errors.
